name: aegis-lang
description: Syntax highlighting and live diagnostics for the Aegis programming language (Windows + Linux + macOS).

aegis.executablePath.description: Path to the aegis compiler executable. Defaults to 'aegis' on PATH — on Windows this resolves to aegis.exe automatically if it's on PATH. Set an absolute path (e.g. C:\tools\aegis\aegis.exe or /usr/local/bin/aegis) if it isn't.

aegis.checkOnSave.description: Run 'aegis check' automatically whenever an .ae file is saved.

aegis.checkOnType.description: Also run 'aegis check' as you type (debounced 500ms). Off by default since it spawns a process per check.
